reference: I SEE YOU CAN CHIDE WHEN YOU PLEASE AND WITH AUTHORITY BUT I DESERVE IT I CONFESS AND ALL I CAN SAY FOR MYSELF IS THAT MY FAULT PROCEEDED FROM A VERY GOOD PRINCIPLE IN ME
text: I see you can chid when you please. And with authority, but I deserve it. I confess, and all I can say for myself is, that my fault proceeded from a very good principle in me.
